title: 12 Piece Faux Leather Table Set | 6 Placemats & 6 Coasters | Party Place Mats by M&W (Brown)
features: ✔️ HEAT RESISTANT - Heat resistant up to 55 °C the Maison & White table set is perfect for your sizzling meals and hot drinks.
✔️ EASY WIPE - When you’ve finished eating and the clean up begins, the Maison & White table set can simply be wiped down with a damp cloth, dried and stored away ready for your next dinner party.

✔️ TABLE SERVICE - The Maison & White 12 Piece Leather Table Set is an amazing addition to any busy dinner table. Included in the set are 6 stylish leather placemats and 6 coasters providing you with plenty of tableware for the whole family.
✔️ SIZE - Placemats 21.5 cm x 28.9 cm, Coasters 10cm x 10 cm
✔️ 2-YEAR WARRANTY - Comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
description: Product Description Faux Leather Placemats & Coaster Table Set If it's your turn to host a dinner party amongst your circle of friends, preparation is key. From the important components like your delicious main course, right down to the details of how you set the table, all of us want to impress our peers with a sense of style and taste. The Maison & White 12 Piece Faux Leather Table Set is a fantastic addition to any regular hosts table. Included in the set are 6 faux leather placemats with a discreetly debossed Maison & White logo and 6 faux leather coasters so you’re equipped for setting a full dinner table ready for hungry guests. Designed with stylish subtlety in mind, the Maison & White table set is perfect for adding a sense of finesse to your table and is sure to leave your post-dinner conversation diverting to where they can get their hands on some! ✔️ TABLE SERVICE The Maison & White 12 Piece Leather Table Set is an amazing addition to any busy dinner table. Included in the set are 6 stylish black leather placemats and 6 coasters providing you with plenty of tableware for the whole family. ✔️ HEAT RESISTANT Heat resistant up to 55 °C the Maison & White table set is perfect for your sizzling meals and hot drinks. ✔️ EASY WIPE When you’ve finished eating and the clean up begins, the Maison & White table set can simply be wiped down with a damp cloth, dried and stored away ready for your next dinner party. ✔️ SIZE Placemats 21.5 cm x 28.9 cm, Coasters 10cm x 10 cm Black Blue Grey Brown Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Price £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 — no data £14.99 £ 14 . 99 Black Blue Grey Brown Specifications: Size: (Placemats) 21.5cm x 28.9cm Size: (Coasters) 10cm x 10cm MateriaI: Faux Leather In the Box: 6 x Placemats, 6 x Coasters Images: All product images 2019 Maison & White (Xbite Ltd)
